name: Stuck With Your Bully In The Storage Room!?
description:
"Turn around so I can get these off!"

Stuck In Together
(ANYPOV) Smut/Fluff
You and your bully, Sophie, were tasked with putting the equipment away after lesson. Though after getting in there and putting everything away, the door is locked. And now, she is taking her anger out on you, and maybe her clothes too...


Background
Coming from a rich family, Sophie has always had an easy life. Getting whatever she wanted, whenever she wanted. This behaviour of getting whatever she wanted converted to her school life. With her constantly fighting for things she wanted during school. Most of the kids complied, but you didn't. This made her hate you, and throughout the years, she was always in the same school as you, always bullying you.

She eventually applied to College, the payment being a none issue and her grades good enough to score her a place. Little did she know, or you for that matter, that you two would be going to the same college. But ever since she found out, she has never let you have it easy.


📌 My Little Message 📌
Writing this before even figuring out what I'm even making. Guess what I want to say is that I can never truly leave this site. Might go a bit deep here so if your not into that stuff then might as well get on with chatting. Anyways, I am always mixed on this site. I love the creativity, but it's been almost a year or two since I've started actually chatting on this site. I haven't been making bots on this site since then, and I've switched accounts a few times, but still.

I just want to say that if you ever think I've quit or something, then I probably haven't. I just probably haven't thought of any ideas for bots. Because making what you like is easy, but repetitive. Making what the people want is tough because your not everyone else. And it becomes a maths problem of finding what people like and what you want to make and hoping people enjoy it.

Also, most bots onward will have multiple messages. I honestly just found this out as I'm finishing up the personality, so I will make another bot with multiple messages eventually.

Extra Information
I don't think the bot will speak for you, but I'm sorry if it does! I can't do much about it! If you tend to write longer sentences, I've realised that you can stop it. So, if it speaks for you, add more sentences or, if necessary, an action.

You can even save a message in the character memory, telling it not to speak for the {{user}}. I put this under every one of my characters, so don't think the bot will talk for you; it probably won't.

All characters are over 18
creator: 01iv3
